violations.description: Ensure role attribute has an appropriate value for the element
violations.help: ARIA role should be appropriate for the element

violations.description: Ensure aria-hidden elements are not focusable nor contain focusable elements
violations.help: ARIA hidden element must not be focusable or contain focusable elements

violations.description: Ensure <iframe> and <frame> elements have an accessible name
violations.help: Frames must have an accessible name

violations.description: Ensure elements have alternative text or a role of none or presentation
Ensure the document has a main landmark
violations.help: Document should have one main landmark

violations.description: Ensure all page content is contained by landmarks
violations.help: All page content should be contained by landmarks
